metadata.rule_link: Harvesting requires a 'Poisoner’s Kit' or 'Arcana' check (DC varies).

ingredients.name: Dragon's Blood (Ancient)
ingredients.refined_result: Potion of Dragon's Majesty / Permanent Weapon Enchantment (+1 Fire/Cold/etc)
ingredients.note: Boils at room temperature; requires a lead-lined flask.

ingredients.name: Displacer Hide Shavings
ingredients.refined_result: Cloak of Displacement (Material) / Potion of Invisibility
ingredients.raw_effect: Gives the holder 'Blur' for 1 round, then disintegrates.

ingredients.name: Basilisk Gallbladder
ingredients.refined_result: Oil of Ethirialness / Potion of Greater Restoration (Petrification only)
ingredients.raw_effect: Extremely corrosive; deals 2d6 acid damage to non-glass containers.

ingredients.name: Astral Essence (Stardust)
ingredients.refined_result: Potion of Flying / Oil of Sharpness
ingredients.note: Weightless. A full jar weighs 0 lbs but pulls upward with 5 lbs of force.

ingredients.name: Mimic Adhesive (Gland)
ingredients.raw_effect: Sticks to any surface instantly. Requires a Strength check (DC 17) to pull free.

ingredients.name: Ghostly Ectoplasm
ingredients.refined_result: Potion of Possession Resistance / Ghost Oil
ingredients.raw_effect: Freezes any liquid it touches instantly.

ingredients.name: Beholder Eye Lens
ingredients.refined_result: Anti-Magic Field Generator / Robe of Eyes (Component)
ingredients.note: If damaged during harvest, the ingredient becomes worthless 'Clouded Glass'.

ingredients.name: Shocker Lizard Tail
ingredients.refined_result: Potion of Speed / Lightning Resistance Potion
ingredients.raw_effect: Can be used as a 1-use 'Shocking Grasp' cantrip (d6 damage).

ingredients.name: Unrefined Cold Iron
ingredients.note: Cannot be forged with magical fire; must be cold-hammered.
